_doc: Machine-readable metadata for the 'documentation-engineer' agent. Produced by skill-generator. Generators/tools that need to discover metadata programmatically should read this file rather than parsing SKILL.md. This file is self-contained: it does not require reading any other asset to be understood.
name: documentation-engineer
description: Keeps this project's documentation accurate and in sync with the actual code: README, docstrings, architecture docs, and CHANGELOG entries. Use this whenever the user asks to write, update, or review documentation, asks for a README/CHANGELOG update, or asks whether docs match current behavior after a code change.
notes: SKILL.md and role.md have been fully authored (no TODO placeholders). Responsibility is scoped strictly to documentation (docstrings, README, architecture docs, CHANGELOG) and explicitly excludes feature code (Python Engineer), tests (Testing Engineer), security review (Security Engineer), and git operations (Git Engineer) to avoid overlapping responsibilities. docs/AI_CONSTITUTION.md and docs/AI_FACTORY.md do not yet exist in this repository (see context_sources.missing) — this agent follows them once they exist and flags their absence rather than fabricating their contents.

context_sources._doc: Which project constitution/rules documents skill-generator found at generation time. See CHANGELOG.md V1 -> V2, item 1.

architecture_graph._doc: Whether graphify-out/graph.json was available and what it showed. See CHANGELOG.md V1 -> V2, item 2.

project_structure_source._doc: Whether graphify-out/manifest.json was available to establish project structure. See CHANGELOG.md V1 -> V2, item 3.

engineering_rules_injected._doc: Every generated skill automatically includes these rule categories. See CHANGELOG.md V1 -> V2, item 4.
